title: Executive Order 12638—Delegation of Functions Relating to the Implementation of the Inter-American Convention on Letters Rogatory and Additional Protocol

flags.justification: A narrow, technical designation implementing a Senate-ratified treaty.
A clear, specific designation tied to the treaty's own requirements.
A treaty-implementation designation, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing designation implementing a permanent treaty obligation.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, technical implementation of an already-ratified international convention.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
